# Io

> A small, prototype-based programming language — now targeting WASM/WASI.

## Documentation

- [Documentation](/docs/): Guides, tutorial, language reference, and design notes.
- [Future Work](/docs/Future%20Work/): Design notes and proposals for upcoming changes.
- [Exceptions](/docs/Future%20Work/Exceptions/): Design notes on the current exception system and proposed improvements.
- [Guide](/docs/Guide/): Comprehensive language guide: syntax, messages, objects, control flow, concurrency, and more.
- [Reference](/docs/Reference/)
- [Block](/docs/Reference/Block/)
- [Call](/docs/Reference/Call/)
- [CFunction](/docs/Reference/CFunction/)
- [Collector](/docs/Reference/Collector/)
- [Compiler](/docs/Reference/Compiler/)
- [Continuation](/docs/Reference/Continuation/)
- [Coroutine](/docs/Reference/Coroutine/)
- [Date](/docs/Reference/Date/)
- [Debugger](/docs/Reference/Debugger/)
- [Directory](/docs/Reference/Directory/)
- [DirectoryCollector](/docs/Reference/DirectoryCollector/)
- [Duration](/docs/Reference/Duration/)
- [Error](/docs/Reference/Error/)
- [EvalFrame](/docs/Reference/EvalFrame/)
- [Exception](/docs/Reference/Exception/)
- [false](/docs/Reference/false/)
- [File](/docs/Reference/File/)
- [FileCollector](/docs/Reference/FileCollector/)
- [FileImporter](/docs/Reference/FileImporter/)
- [Importer](/docs/Reference/Importer/)
- [List](/docs/Reference/List/)
- [Map](/docs/Reference/Map/)
- [Message](/docs/Reference/Message/)
- [MutableSequence](/docs/Reference/MutableSequence/)
- [nil](/docs/Reference/nil/)
- [Number](/docs/Reference/Number/)
- [Object](/docs/Reference/Object/)
- [Path](/docs/Reference/Path/)
- [Profiler](/docs/Reference/Profiler/)
- [Sandbox](/docs/Reference/Sandbox/)
- [Scheduler](/docs/Reference/Scheduler/)
- [Sequence](/docs/Reference/Sequence/)
- [State](/docs/Reference/State/)
- [System](/docs/Reference/System/)
- [TestRunner](/docs/Reference/TestRunner/)
- [true](/docs/Reference/true/)
- [UnitTest](/docs/Reference/UnitTest/)
- [WeakLink](/docs/Reference/WeakLink/)
- [Stackless](/docs/Stackless/): Io's iterative evaluator, continuations, and coroutines.
- [Stackless VM Examples](/docs/Stackless/Examples/)
- [Stackless Evaluator Report](/docs/Stackless/Report/)
- [Style Guide](/docs/Style%20Guide/): How to write idiomatic Io — naming, formatting, comments, and the patterns used throughout the standard library.
- [Tutorial](/docs/Tutorial/): A short, example-driven tour of Io for folks who already know how to program. Each section is a quick REPL session.
- [WASM](/docs/WASM/): Running Io in the browser via WebAssembly.
- [Browser Target](/docs/WASM/Browser%20Target/): Io runs in the browser as a WebAssembly module. The browser build compiles the full VM into a WASM reactor module that JS loads and drives via exported functions.
- [DOM Interop](/docs/WASM/DOM%20Interop/): Io code running in the browser can query, create, and manipulate HTML elements through the DOM object and Element instances.
